text:

Log:
  irc/irssi: Fix Perl support option

  Make Perl a run time option only when Perl option is selected. Perl is needed to
  build always.

  Submitted by:	dor.bsd@xm0.uk (maintainer)
  Reported by:	daniel.engberg.lists@pyret.net
